reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para cargar Nafta y descansar un rato antes de seguir en la ruta. Baños limpios, Kiosco completo, aire para las cubiertas, todos los medios de pago y área de descanso con bancos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to fill up with gas and rest before continuing on your route. Clean restrooms, a fully stocked convenience store, tire inflation, all forms of payment accepted, and a rest area with benches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcmRUYnh3RRAB
